title: Daily Driver Prompt
content:
- This text is a setup for our conversation moving forward. There is no task here yet, that will follow. Signal that you have understood this context before I proceed to give you a task or list of tasks.
- thought: "A second step toward solving the problem based on the initial thought"
- evaluation: "sure/maybe/impossible"
- final_thought: "A final step that gives the best solution"
